meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.7 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] The box-character enclosure 「X」は「□」囲み with no preceding referent: the quoted target 一 has no earlier copy, so it IS the boxed run (SelfContained) rather than a Reclaimed pull-back. The bracket is consumed whole; the leading 本文 stays as plain text. §8 renders 一; serialize re-emits byte-exact. Offsets from the §4 byte model (each fullwidth char = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor.
